steps.title: End the first sentence
steps.content: The sentence first states that Ray released his first movie, Pather Panchali. The next idea starts with a descriptive phrase, 'A quiet black-and-white drama,' before the main clause says Ray's film was different.

steps.title: Avoid a comma splice
steps.content: Choice A runs the title directly into the description. Choice B creates a relative clause that leaves the later main clause awkwardly attached. Choice C uses commas but still leaves the release clause and the 'Ray's film was' clause joined incorrectly. The answer is D.
